page_content:
Formerly: EDCI788Q.

Additional Information: Priority will be given to students in the Technology Learning and Leadership specialization.

TLPL704 Research Methodologies and Educational Practice (3 Credits) Introduction to methodological approaches commonly used in educational research with a focus on addressing issues in teaching and learning, schools and communities, and educational policy.

Restriction: Must be in Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership Master of Arts program; or permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. TLPL788W or TLPL704.
